channel.title: PrairieUp on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in PrairieUp on Nature Works

item.title: Radical Horticulture
item.description:
Gardens are irrevocably connected to society, and we need a radical shake-up of both

I read Benjamin Vogt’s A New Garden Ethic a few years ago (it’s brililant, have a read), and he continues joining up the dots between society, politics, economics and gardening with native plants. http://localhost:1313/blog/230805-radical-horticulture/

item.title: Benjamin Vogt & Wildlife Trees
item.description:
No, not a prairie woodland mash up but two separate online events in one evening

I have a lot of time for Benjamin Vogt. He’s an ornamental native plant gardener, which means he’s a wildlife gardener by default. http://localhost:1313/blog/230124-vogt-trees/
